Legal Center

Legal documents and policy pages

This page groups the current SLYDE legal documents by audience so applicants, merchants, and public website users can review the active terms and notices in one place.

For Slyders

Privacy, onboarding, and courier-platform terms for applicants and future Slyder accounts.

SLYDE Final Courier Terms

Final post-approval terms that govern Slyder account activation, setup, readiness, and operational eligibility.

Version 2026.03.19Effective 20/03/2026

Slyder Applicant Privacy Notice

How SLYDE collects, reviews, stores, and protects Slyder applicant data during application, verification, and onboarding.

Version 2026.03.19Effective 19/03/2026

Slyder Application and Onboarding Terms

Launch-stage application and onboarding terms for future Slyders joining the SLYDE network.

Version 2026.03.19Effective 19/03/2026

For Merchants

Privacy and onboarding terms for merchants joining SLYDE region by region.

Merchant Interest and Onboarding Terms

The launch-stage terms that apply when a merchant submits interest, joins the waitlist, or begins onboarding with SLYDE.

Version 2026.03.19Effective 19/03/2026

Merchant Privacy Notice

How SLYDE collects, uses, stores, and protects merchant and business-contact information during the waitlist, onboarding, and launch process.

Version 2026.03.19Effective 19/03/2026

General Policies

Website-wide legal documents and platform policies that apply broadly across the public site.

Website Privacy Policy

How SLYDE handles information submitted through the public website.

Version 2026.03.19Effective 19/03/2026

Website Terms of Use

Terms that apply to use of the SLYDE public website.

Version 2026.03.19Effective 19/03/2026

Jamaica-First Logistics Infrastructure

SLYDE connects courier capacity, merchant fulfillment, and partner-ready logistics workflows.

Built for local operational credibility now, with standards that can support wider Caribbean scale later.
SLYDELogistics

SLYDE is a modern logistics network for Jamaica first, designed to support courier operations, merchant fulfillment, and future Caribbean partner integrations.

SLYDE is a company of A'Dash Technologies, the parent company and sister brand of GrabQuik.

Developed by Ashandie Powell.

Located in Southfield, St. Elizabeth, Jamaica.
